title: Update text labels to 'Legend', 'X', 'Arena'

requirements.text: Update all instances of the team/brand name text labels across the frontend so they are displayed as three separate styled elements: 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena' — each word on its own line or as a distinct styled segment, consistent with the esports visual theme.
acceptanceCriteria: The brand/team name is rendered as three distinct text elements: 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena'
Each word ('Legend', 'X', 'Arena') is visually separated and styled consistently with the existing esports theme
The label appears correctly in the Navbar, HeroSection, and Footer wherever the team name is displayed
No other text content is altered

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not change any other content, layout, or styling beyond the text label update
nonGoals: Changing the overall brand identity or color scheme
Modifying backend data or Motoko actor
Reverting or altering any version history changes beyond the text label update
